anthony edwards.detail: Played 24 minutes in a blowout loss (133-95); limited minutes likely due to game flow in lopsided game
anthony edwards.web_narrative: Edwards shot 5-13 for 12 points in 24 minutes as Minnesota was blown out 133-95 by San Antonio in Game 2. The reduced minutes appear tied to the lopsided score rather than injury, and he was ineffective shooting.

de'aaron fox.detail: Played 26 minutes with no indicated in-game exit; finger surgery reference appears to be from a prior season
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox finished with only 2 assists in 26 minutes, falling well short of the over 4 assists prop. No source indicates a mid-game exit or restriction for this game; the miss appears to be a performance outcome.

og anunoby.detail: Exited late in game with a leg injury; listed as questionable pre-game
og anunoby.web_narrative: Anunoby appeared to suffer a leg injury late in Wednesday's Game 2 win over Philadelphia, per Rotowire. He finished with 37 minutes and 24 points but exited with a leg issue before normal game completion.

stephon castle.detail: 24 minutes played; went 0-1 from three despite scoring 21 points overall
stephon castle.web_narrative: Castle scored 21 points on 6-10 shooting but attempted only one three-pointer and missed it, falling short of the over 1 3PM prop. His scoring came primarily from two-point field goals and free throws (9-9), not from beyond the arc.
